data.body: Done definition update: ticket exists honors TICKET_TRACKER_OVERRIDE and CONF_OVERRIDE environment variables passed by test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh (the existing test suite reads TICKET_TRACKER_OVERRIDE at ~line 125 to inject a fixture tracker). Add a unit test that verifies: invoking .claude/scripts/dso ticket exists with TICKET_TRACKER_OVERRIDE set routes to the injected tracker directory rather than the default .tickets-tracker/. The archive-agnostic behavior is additionally verified against a tracker containing both archived and active tickets. SC1's 'full flag/output/exit-code preservation' is extended here to explicitly cover env-var pass-through, which is a distinct contract surface. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
